<svg viewBox="0 0 1120 4040" width="1120" height="4040" role="img" aria-labelledby="chart-title chart-desc">
<title id="chart-title">DASHSys end-to-end system dataflow flowchart</title>
<desc id="chart-desc">Input + Preflight | Routing + Query Understanding | Context + Planning | SQL Evidence Path | Adobe API Evidence Path | EvidenceBus | Answer Generation | Trajectory + Packaging | Evaluation + Reports | Diagnostic / Trial Side Paths | Mock Live API Readiness | Evidence-Aware Answer Rewrite | Runtime Config | Prompt Routing | QueryAnalysis | SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY | SQL Evidence | Adobe API Evidence | Adobe credentials present? | Live API | Dry-run fallback | API Response Parser | Discovery-chain readiness | Mock Live API Readiness | EvidenceBus | Answer Slots | Answer Synthesis | Claim Faithfulness | Final Answer | Trajectory Logging | Final Submission | Strict Eval | Hidden-style Eval | LLM Semantic Routing Helper | Evidence-Aware Answer Rewrite | not promoted | keep_trial_only | packaged runtime path | shadow diagnostic path | isolated trial path | User Prompt | Runtime Config Env + strategy | Safety Preflight validators intact | Prompt Routing | Simple Prompt Gate | Query Normalization | Query Token Extraction | Deterministic QueryRouter | Answer Intent | QueryAnalysis | SchemaIndex / EndpointCatalog | Relevance Scoring | Context Packing | SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY main strategy | Evidence Policy | SQL / API Plan | SQL Template / Generic SQL | SQL validation passed? | SQLGlot AST Validation | execute_sql DuckDB snapshot | SQL Result | SQL Evidence | API Plan | API validation passed? | Credential Headers | Adobe credentials present? | Live API mode readiness: warning | Dry-run fallback | API Response Parser | Evidence State live / empty / error | Parsed API Evidence | EvidenceBus | IDs / names / counts / statuses | SQL / live API / dry-run state | Answer Slots | Answer Synthesis | Claim Faithfulness Check | Final Answer | Trajectory Logging | trajectory.json / metadata.json / prompt | Final Submission | Strict Eval score: 0.6553 | Hidden-style Eval 48/48 | Check Submission ready: True | Report Index / Consolidated reports | Semantic router enabled? | SDK LLMClient | LLM Semantic Routing Helper | Hint Validation | shadow / not promoted | SDK LLM Baseline Diagnostic only | Synthetic Fixtures | Mock Parser success: 126 | Discovery-chain readiness | EvidenceBus Forwarding | Answer Slot Verification | Diagnostic only | Evidence-Aware Answer Synthesis | Claim Faithfulness | Answer-only Rewrite Trial | keep_trial_only not promoted</desc>
<defs>
<filter id="soft-shadow" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="125%"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="1.2" stdDeviation="1.4" flood-color="#0f172a" flood-opacity=".12"/></filter>
<marker id="arrow-packaged" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#14532d"/></marker>
<marker id="arrow-final" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1d4ed8"/></marker>
<marker id="arrow-muted" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#64748b"/></marker>
<marker id="arrow-trial" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#a16207"/></marker>
</defs>
<rect class="section-bg main-cluster" x="315" y="34" width="470" height="292" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="333" y="62">Input + Preflight</text>
<rect class="section-bg main-cluster" x="300" y="352" width="500" height="600" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="318" y="380">Routing + Query Understanding</text>

<text class="section-label" x="318" y="1044">Context + Planning</text>

<rect class="section-bg api-cluster" x="580" y="1608" width="480" height="728" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="598" y="1636">Adobe API Evidence Path</text>
<rect class="section-bg evidence-cluster" x="335" y="2388" width="430" height="300" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="353" y="2416">EvidenceBus</text>
<rect class="section-bg answer-cluster" x="335" y="2732" width="430" height="386" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="353" y="2760">Answer Generation</text>
<rect class="section-bg final-cluster" x="335" y="3220" width="430" height="296" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="353" y="3248">Trajectory + Packaging</text>
<rect class="section-bg eval-cluster" x="335" y="3610" width="430" height="366" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="353" y="3638">Evaluation + Reports</text>
<rect class="section-bg diag-cluster" x="760" y="372" width="330" height="580" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="778" y="400">Diagnostic / Trial Side Paths</text>
<rect class="section-bg diag-cluster" x="760" y="1608" width="330" height="545" rx="16"/>
